items.name: gnark-crypto
items.description: gnark-crypto-cmd — Interactive CLI for Consensys gnark-crypto library featuring elliptic curve cryptography (BN254, BLS12-381, BLS24, BW6), zero-knowledge proof primitives, FFT/KZG/MiMC/EdDSA operations, Go code generation, benchmarks, and BibTeX citation export
